mapper.select: SELECT urm.user_id, urm.role_id, urm.use_bgng_dt, urm.use_end_dt, urm.frst_reg_dt, urm.frst_reg_user_id, urm.last_chg_dt, urm.last_chg_user_id, r.role_nm, r.ognz_se_cd_allowed FROM com.tn_user_role_mpng urm JOIN com.tn_role r ON r.role_id = urm.role_id AND NOW() BETWEEN r.use_bgng_dt AND r.use_end_dt WHERE urm.user_id = #{userId} AND NOW() BETWEEN urm.use_bgng_dt AND urm.use_end_dt ORDER BY urm.use_bgng_dt DESC

SELECT urm.user_id, urm.role_id, urm.use_bgng_dt, urm.use_end_dt, urm.frst_reg_dt, urm.frst_reg_user_id, urm.last_chg_dt, urm.last_chg_user_id, r.role_nm, r.ognz_se_cd_allowed FROM com.tn_user_role_mpng urm LEFT JOIN com.tn_role r ON r.role_id = urm.role_id WHERE urm.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY urm.use_bgng_dt DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO com.tn_user_role_mpng (user_id, role_id, use_bgng_dt, use_end_dt, frst_reg_dt, frst_reg_user_id, last_chg_dt, last_chg_user_id) VALUES (#{userId}, #{roleId}, NOW(), '9999-12-31 23:59:59', NOW(), #{frstRegUserId}, NOW(), #{lastChgUserId})
